name: Millhaven's Morning Plate
description: A classic Millhaven breakfast. Slices of mincemeat patty are heated through and served alongside fried eggs, sausages, and potatoes. Nutritious and hearty, this meal provides all the energy needed to power through a busy morning.

suspicious.name: Suspicious Millhaven's Morning Plate
suspicious.description: A classic Millhaven breakfast. The cold mincemeat patty is as hard as a rock. It's like gnawing on a greasy brick... Ugh, was it really worth leaving a warm, cozy bed for a morning meal like this?

normal.name: Millhaven's Morning Plate
normal.description: A classic Millhaven breakfast. Slices of mincemeat patty are heated through and served alongside fried eggs, sausages, and potatoes. Nutritious and hearty, this meal provides all the energy needed to power through a busy morning.

delicious.name: Delicious Millhaven's Morning Plate
delicious.description: A classic Millhaven breakfast. Fresh from the oven, the rich aroma of savory meat and toasted char rises to meet you, instantly transforming morning drowsiness into a ravenous appetite. A brand new day should always begin with such a magnificent overture!
